div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%

table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Information about the use of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the element can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Reference to the type of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck11.png)

vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck110.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

span.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red
span.title: This element has obligations

td.span: Indicates how quickly the request should be addressed with respect to other requests.

td.style: font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px

font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;

td.span: Health conditions relevant for the results interpretation, e.g. fasting status, sex for clinical use, etc.

td.style: font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck00.png)

span.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red
span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
td.span: Specimens to be used by the laboratory procedure

td.style: font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;

description.value: Obligations for the logical model of service request in the scope of laboratory use case

short.value: Service request model

definition.value: The model covers details about a requested service or services. One order may include several requests.

short.value: Basic metadata for this information

definition.value: Basic metadata for this information

valueMarkdown.value: EHR systems SHALL provide information about the subject of care (patient).

short.value: Patient/subject information

definition.value: Patient/subject information

valueMarkdown.value: A business identifier SHALL be populated, if known.

short.value: Business identifier for the object, unique within its system. Supporting disambiguation between different contexts (systems/countries).

definition.value: Business identifier for the object, unique within its system. Supporting disambiguation between different contexts (systems/countries).

valueMarkdown.value: Service request authorship SHALL be present.

short.value: Author(s) responsible for the provided information.

definition.value: Author(s) responsible for the provided information. The exact role of the responsible author varies across use cases and is specific to individual models.

valueMarkdown.value: Issue date SHALL be present.

short.value: Date and optionally time of authoring/issuing

definition.value: Date and optionally time of authoring/issuing

valueMarkdown.value: SHALL be able to populate status of the service request.

short.value: Status of the resource or document

definition.value: Status of the resource or document

short.value: Source of information (e.g. patient, patient's proxy). Used in case the patient has authored the information or the author has submitted patient-stated information.

definition.value: Source of information (e.g. patient, patient's proxy). Used in case the patient has authored the information or the author has submitted patient-stated information.

short.value: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.

definition.value: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.

valueMarkdown.value: SHALL populate service request note, if known.

short.value: Textual description of the requested service

definition.value: Textual description of the requested service

valueMarkdown.value: SHALL populate type of requested service

short.value: A code and name that identifies a particular service (i.e., procedure, diagnostic investigation, or panel of investigations) that have been requested.

definition.value: A code and name that identifies a particular service (i.e., procedure, diagnostic investigation, or panel of investigations) that have been requested.

valueMarkdown.value: Quantity of requested service SHALL be populated

short.value: Amount of requested services of the same type

definition.value: Amount of requested services of the same type

short.value: Anatomic location and laterality where the procedure should be performed. This is the target site.

definition.value: Anatomic location and laterality where the procedure should be performed. This is the target site.

valueMarkdown.value: Reason for service request SHALL be populated

short.value: Reason why this service is being requested.

definition.value: Reason why this service is being requested.

valueMarkdown.value: SHALL be able to populate service request priority, if known.

short.value: Indicates how quickly the request should be addressed with respect to other requests.

definition.value: Indicates how quickly the request should be addressed with respect to other requests.

valueMarkdown.value: SHALL populate supporting information for the servce request, e.g. Medication, Procedure, Observation, etc., if known.

short.value: Health conditions relevant for the results interpretation, e.g. fasting status, sex for clinical use, etc.

definition.value: Health conditions relevant for the results interpretation, e.g. fasting status, sex for clinical use, etc.

valueMarkdown.value: SHALL populate related specimen, if known.

short.value: Specimens to be used by the laboratory procedure

definition.value: Specimens to be used by the laboratory procedure

short.value: The encounter that provides additional information about the healthcare context in which this request is made.

definition.value: The encounter that provides additional information about the healthcare context in which this request is made.

short.value: Expected time of the service

definition.value: Expected time of the service

short.value: Patient or consumer-oriented instructions

definition.value: Patient or consumer-oriented instructions

valueMarkdown.value: EHR systems SHALL provide information about the subject of care (patient).
A business identifier SHALL be populated, if known.
Service request authorship SHALL be present.
Issue date SHALL be present.
SHALL be able to populate status of the service request.
SHALL populate service request note, if known.
SHALL populate type of requested service
Quantity of requested service SHALL be populated
Reason for service request SHALL be populated
SHALL be able to populate service request priority, if known.
SHALL populate supporting information for the servce request, e.g. Medication, Procedure, Observation, etc., if known.
SHALL populate related specimen, if known.
